headline: McDonald's Big Arch Burger Tests Brand Power And Rich Valuation
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) has introduced the Big Arch burger as part of an intensifying fast food "burger wars" environment. The launch is supported by prominent social media marketing and viral appearances from the McDonald's CEO. Rivalry with competitors such as Burger King and Wendy's has been amplified through playful online exchanges around the new burger. McDonald's has also rolled out a "First Job Confessional" campaign to deepen customer and worker engagement through personal...

headline: McDonald’s Real Risk From $150 Oil Has Nothing to Do With Costs
summary: McDonald’s (NYSE:MCD) looks like it should be deeply exposed to oil. Beef production is energy-intensive. Packaging is petroleum-derived. Drive-through customers feel every tick higher at the pump. Delivery partners burn fuel on every order. And with operations spanning 70+ markets globally, the logistics exposure is real. But here’s where the story gets interesting. McDonald’s has ... McDonald’s Real Risk From $150 Oil Has Nothing to Do With Costs
